title: I Blew 3 Funded Accounts Before Learning This One Thing
description: Two years of blown accounts. Fixed by understanding one ICT concept that smart money uses every single Monday. This is the real reason beginners fail funded challenges in 2026 — and exactly what R2F Trading teaches to fix it. Watch till the end.
script: I blew 3 funded accounts in 8 months. Same mistake. Every. Single. Time. Every Monday I'd see a breakout. I'd chase it. Stop hit. Account gone. Turns out — that Monday move wasn't a breakout. It was a liquidity sweep. Smart money raids Friday's range first. Then the real move starts. Once I saw the order block left behind — entries became obvious. Risk dropped 60%. The R2F Trading system taught this in week one. 10 years of smart money research. All mapped out. Follow R2F Trading. Free resources at r2ftrading.com. Don't lose another account to a move you didn't understand.
